images.prompt: cinematic commercial real estate underwriting desk scene at night
images.scene: upper-floor office at night with a soft city skyline glow beyond the glass
images.subject: calculator, site plans, stacked financial papers turned away from camera, and a heavy desk with no visible letters or numbers
images.style: premium editorial photography with real texture and restraint
images.composition: wide horizontal frame, desk objects in the foreground, generous depth behind them
images.lighting: moody tungsten desk lamp mixed with cool teal city light, shallow depth of field
images.palette: charcoal, warm amber, muted teal, weathered paper white
images.materials: matte calculator plastic, vellum plans, crisp paper edges, dark wood desk
images.constraints: no people; no readable text; no visible letters or numbers on paper; no logos; no watermark
images.negative: stock photo vibe; cheesy lens flare; oversaturated neon; excessive clutter; fake glossy render; readable memo title

images.prompt: rain-soaked commercial construction site paused in uncertainty
images.scene: empty suburban jobsite at dawn after rain with wrapped columns, chain-link fence, and an idle tower crane
images.subject: unfinished concrete slab, exposed columns, construction materials sitting untouched, and a sense of caution
images.composition: wide cinematic frame from outside the fence, slightly low eye level, strong foreground pavement texture
images.lighting: cold overcast morning light with soft reflections on wet concrete
images.palette: slate gray, wet concrete, muted rust, faded orange safety accents
images.materials: wet asphalt, wrapped concrete columns, chain-link fence, puddles
images.constraints: no workers; no readable signage; no logos; no watermark
images.negative: dramatic explosion energy; sunny optimism; oversharpening; artificial HDR

images.prompt: partially completed urban high-rise under gathering storm pressure
images.scene: unfinished steel and concrete tower above a city skyline as heavy storm clouds move in
images.subject: orange safety netting, exposed structure, hanging crane line, and a feeling of overextension
images.composition: wide telephoto crop with the unfinished floors dominating frame left and storm skyline opening to the right
images.lighting: dark storm light with one break of pale late-day sun at the horizon
images.palette: storm blue, gunmetal, faded orange, pale gold
images.materials: steel frame, concrete decks, mesh netting, distant glass towers
images.constraints: no people; no readable text; no logos; no watermark
images.negative: clean luxury tower glamour; bright cheerful weather; cartoonish skyline

images.prompt: quiet private real estate office expressing patience, liquidity, and optionality
images.scene: disciplined investor office at first light with a skyline view and untouched deal folders
images.subject: well-ordered desk, simple notebook, fountain pen, neat stack of folders, and open breathing room
images.composition: wide horizontal shot with negative space, clean desk plane, and calm skyline depth
images.lighting: soft dawn light, low contrast, composed and calm mood
images.palette: warm gray, taupe, muted brass, soft blue dawn
images.materials: linen folders, smooth wood desk, glass, brushed metal pen
images.constraints: no people; no readable text; no logos; no watermark
images.negative: messy desk; frantic trading floor energy; flashy luxury staging

images.prompt: decisive acquisition moment in a stressed commercial real estate market
images.scene: distressed industrial property at sunrise just after bad weather has cleared
images.subject: weathered warehouse facade, loading bays, wet pavement, and one clean black SUV arriving with purpose
images.composition: wide frame, warehouse dominating the image, arrival moment implied rather than crowded
images.lighting: fresh post-storm sunrise light with dramatic cloud breakup and reflective pavement
images.palette: slate, wet asphalt black, rusted steel, sunrise gold
images.materials: corrugated metal, concrete dock, rain reflections, glass headlights
images.constraints: no readable text; no visible brands; no watermark
images.negative: action movie chaos; exaggerated explosions; glossy luxury brochure look

images.prompt: fortress balance sheet concept rendered as a premium real estate still life
images.scene: dark architectural workspace with site plans, ruler, calculator, and stacked documents arranged with fortress-like geometry
images.subject: financial discipline and resilience expressed through objects rather than people
images.style: cinematic concept still life grounded in real materials
images.composition: wide dramatic tabletop composition with strong geometry and a subtle sense of defensive strength
images.lighting: controlled pool of warm light over the desk against a deep shadow background
images.palette: charcoal, warm ivory paper, muted brass, restrained teal accents
images.materials: paper, vellum, brass ruler, matte calculator, textured desk surface
images.constraints: no readable text; no logos; no watermark; no literal fantasy fortress
images.negative: glowing holograms; cheesy fintech aesthetic; purple neon; clutter
